tasks.title: ActivityService backend core
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user creates/updates/deletes an object WHEN the event fires THEN an activity event is published with correct app/type/subject/author/link
GIVEN object owner differs from author THEN two events are published
GIVEN IManager::publish() throws THEN exception is caught and logged

tasks.title: ActivityEventListener
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN any of the 9 entity events is dispatched WHEN the listener handles it THEN the correct ActivityService method is called
GIVEN Application boots THEN registerEventListener is called for all 9 events

tasks.title: Activity Provider display
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an activity event with app openregister and any of 9 subjects WHEN parse() is called THEN rich subject and icon are set
GIVEN foreign app or unknown subject WHEN parse() is called THEN UnknownActivityException is thrown

tasks.title: ProviderSubjectHandler
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN any of 9 subjects WHEN applySubjectText() is called THEN parsed and rich subjects are set with correct translations

tasks.title: Activity Filter
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the filter WHEN filterTypes() is called THEN returns all 3 OpenRegister types
GIVEN the filter WHEN allowedApps() is called THEN returns openregister

tasks.title: Activity Settings
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN ObjectSetting THEN identifier=openregister_objects stream default enabled mail default disabled
GIVEN RegisterSetting THEN identifier=openregister_registers
GIVEN SchemaSetting THEN identifier=openregister_schemas

tasks.title: App Registration info.xml
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN appinfo/info.xml THEN activity section contains provider 3 settings and filter

tasks.title: Translations nl/en
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN locale nl THEN all 9 subjects use Dutch translations
GIVEN locale en THEN all 9 subjects use English translations

tasks.title: Unit Tests
acceptance_criteria: ActivityService tests 3+ covering event construction dual notification error handling
Provider tests 3+ covering all subjects unknown activity icon
Listener tests 2+ covering dispatch for all 9 event types
Filter tests 2+ covering identifier filterTypes allowedApps
Settings tests 2+ covering all 3 settings
